# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest main version of JarvisWeb is actively supported for security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take security issues in JarvisWeb very seriously. If you identify any security vulnerability, hardcoded key, or exposure pattern, please **DO NOT** create a public GitHub issue. 

Instead, please report it via one of the following methods:
- Send an email to: `vinicius.ogasawara@pucpr.edu.br` (or contact the project owner directly).
- We will acknowledge receipt of your report within 48 hours and work with you to analyze and patch the issue as quickly as possible.

Thank you for helping keep JarvisWeb secure!
